eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CHILD ABDUCTION EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Texas; at 11:26 AM on JUL 2, 2026 Effective until 2:26 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
AMBER Alert: Child Abduction from Odessa, Texas. Missing child is Maverick Young, 11 month old white male. Suspect is Tinley Young 20 year old white female. Call Ector County Sheriff's Office with information. If seen call 9 1 1. AMBER Alert: Child Abduction from Odessa, Texas. Missing child is Maverick Young, 11 month old white male. Suspect is Tinley Young 20 year old white female. Call Ector County Sheriff's Office with information. If seen call 9 1 1..
